result.finding: Java Maven project with 9 declared dependencies (7 compile/runtime, 2 test-only) defined in pom.xml and resolved in the Docker build stage via 'mvn dependency:go-offline'. Only the fat JAR is copied to the final image.
evidence: Dockerfile build stage: COPY pom.xml + RUN mvn dependency:go-offline -B (pre-fetches all dependencies)
Dockerfile build stage: RUN mvn clean package -DskipTests (packages into fat JAR with all deps bundled)
Dockerfile final stage: COPY --from=build /app/target/photo-album-*.jar app.jar (only JAR, not pom.xml)
pom.xml: 9 declared dependencies managed by spring-boot-starter-parent 2.7.18 BOM
values: Total declared dependencies: 9 (7 compile/runtime + 2 test scope)
Runtime deps: spring-boot-starter-web, spring-boot-starter-thymeleaf, spring-boot-starter-data-jpa, ojdbc8, spring-boot-starter-validation, commons-io 2.11.0, spring-boot-starter-json
Test deps (not in final image): spring-boot-starter-test, h2
